title: Frontend Developer
description: Build clean, fast, well-crafted interfaces for our client projects using React and modern CSS. You'll work closely with design and backend to ship complete features, not just components.
requirements: Solid HTML, CSS and JavaScript fundamentals
Experience with React or a similar framework
An eye for detail and clean UI

title: Backend Developer
description: Design and build the APIs, databases and infrastructure behind our client products. Node.js and cloud experience preferred.
requirements: Experience with Node.js, Express or similar
Bonus: exposure to AWS, GCP or Azure

title: Software Development Intern
description: A hands-on internship for students or recent graduates who want real project experience across the stack.
requirements: Basic programming knowledge in any language
